testcase.name: validate
testcase.system-out: Clicked on radio button Selected the city Selected the from city from UL list Selected the city2 from UL list Selected the to city from UL list Selected the persons travel from list Selected child Selected calender Selected date Clicked on searched Sorted Sorted UL Clicked on webelement Clicked on continue button on booking page Selected gender Entered first name Enter lastname Selected day Selected month Selected year Enter email Email confirmed Selected code Entered mobile number click on continue button Browser is closed
